<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>BySukhraj · Harvard Grad Portraits</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin/>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    :root{
      --crimson:#A51C30;--cd:#8a1728;--black:#0d0d0d;
      --bg:#f8f4ef;--mid:#9a9186;
      --serif:'Cormorant Garamond',Georgia,serif;
      --sans:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
    }
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
    body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--black);font-family:var(--sans);font-weight:300;line-height:1.7;overflow-x:hidden}

    /* NAV */
    nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:1.2rem 3rem;background:rgba(248,244,239,.96);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(165,28,48,.12)}
    .nav-logo{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.2rem;letter-spacing:.04em;color:var(--black);text-decoration:none}
    .nav-logo span{color:var(--crimson)}
    nav ul{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:2rem}
    nav a{font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.13em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--black);text-decoration:none;opacity:.55;transition:opacity .2s,color .2s}
    nav a:hover{opacity:1;color:var(--crimson)}

    /* HERO */
    .hero{min-height:100svh;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:0 0 7rem 3rem;overflow:hidden}
    .hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center 40%;filter:brightness(.45) saturate(.8)}
    .hero-bg::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(13,13,13,.95) 0%,rgba(13,13,13,.2) 60%,transparent 100%)}
    .hero-content{position:relative;z-index:2;max-width:680px}
    .hero-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(248,244,239,.5);margin-bottom:1.4rem;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .7s .15s forwards}
    .hero-tag::before{content:'';display:block;width:24px;height:1px;background:var(--crimson)}
    h1{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(3.5rem,8vw,6.5rem);font-weight:300;line-height:1.03;color:#fff;margin-bottom:1.6rem;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .8s .28s forwards}
    h1 em{font-style:italic;color:#e8a0a8}
    .hero-sub{font-size:1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.58);max-width:460px;margin-bottom:2.5rem;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .8s .42s forwards}
    .btn{display:inline-block;padding:.9rem 2.4rem;background:var(--crimson);color:#fff;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.78rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;transition:background .22s}
    .btn-anim{opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .8s .55s forwards}
    .btn:hover{background:var(--cd)}
    .btn-outline{display:inline-block;padding:.9rem 2.4rem;background:transparent;color:var(--crimson);border:1px solid var(--crimson);font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.78rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;transition:background .22s,color .22s}
    .btn-outline:hover{background:var(--crimson);color:#fff}

    /* SHARED */
    .section-wrap{padding:5.5rem 3rem;border-top:1px solid rgba(13,13,13,.08)}
    .tag{font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--crimson);margin-bottom:.9rem}
    h2{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:300;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
    .rule{width:36px;height:1px;background:var(--crimson);margin-bottom:1.8rem;opacity:.5}

    /* ABOUT */
    .about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start}
    .about-text p{font-size:.95rem;color:rgba(13,13,13,.6);margin-bottom:1rem}
    .about-right{padding-top:3.5rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.4rem}
    .stat{border-left:2px solid var(--crimson);padding-left:1.2rem}
    .stat-num{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:2rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--crimson);line-height:1}
    .stat-label{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--mid);letter-spacing:.04em}

    /* PORTFOLIO — overlap layout */
    .portfolio{background:var(--black);padding:5.5rem 3rem;border-top:3px solid var(--crimson)}
    .portfolio .tag{color:rgba(248,244,239,.4)}
    .portfolio h2{color:#fff}
    .portfolio .rule{opacity:.25}
    .portfolio-inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:center;margin-top:2.5rem}
    .photo-stack{position:relative;height:480px}
    .photo-stack .p1,.photo-stack .p2{position:absolute;overflow:hidden;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07)}
    .photo-stack .p1{width:62%;aspect-ratio:3/4;top:0;left:0;z-index:2}
    .photo-stack .p2{width:58%;aspect-ratio:3/4;bottom:0;right:0;z-index:1;border-color:rgba(165,28,48,.4)}
    .photo-stack img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;display:block;transition:transform .6s ease}
    .photo-stack .p1:hover img,.photo-stack .p2:hover img{transform:scale(1.05)}
    .portfolio-cta{color:#fff}
    .portfolio-cta h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.5rem);font-weight:300;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:1rem}
    .portfolio-cta h3 em{font-style:italic;color:#e8a0a8}
    .portfolio-cta p{font-size:.95rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin-bottom:2rem;line-height:1.8}

    /* BOOKING / PRICING merged */
    .booking-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start}
    .booking-left p{font-size:.95rem;color:rgba(13,13,13,.6);margin-bottom:1.2rem;line-height:1.8}
    .steps{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.4rem;margin-top:.5rem}
    .step{display:flex;gap:1.2rem;align-items:flex-start}
    .step-num{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:2.2rem;color:rgba(165,28,48,.2);font-weight:300;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;width:2.5rem}
    .step-body{}
    .step-title{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:.2rem}
    .step p{font-size:.85rem;color:rgba(13,13,13,.5)}
    .booking-right{padding-top:1rem}
    .referral-box{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:1.3rem;background:var(--crimson);color:#fff;padding:1.8rem 2rem;margin-bottom:2rem}
    .referral-icon{font-size:1.6rem;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:.1rem}
    .referral-box h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:.3rem}
    .referral-box p{font-size:.86rem;opacity:.88;line-height:1.6}
    .contact-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.7rem;margin-top:1.5rem}
    .contact-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;font-size:.88rem;color:var(--black);text-decoration:none;opacity:.6;transition:opacity .2s,color .2s}
    .contact-link:hover{opacity:1;color:var(--crimson)}
    .contact-link .dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--crimson);flex-shrink:0}

    /* FOOTER */
    footer{background:var(--black);color:rgba(248,244,239,.35);padding:2rem 3rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.08em;border-top:3px solid var(--crimson)}
    footer span:first-child{color:rgba(248,244,239,.55)}
    footer a{color:rgba(248,244,239,.45);text-decoration:none}
    footer a:hover{color:var(--crimson)}

    @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

    @media(max-width:768px){
      nav{padding:1rem 1.5rem}nav ul{display:none}
      .hero{padding:0 1.5rem 5rem}
      .section-wrap,.portfolio{padding-left:1.5rem;padding-right:1.5rem}
      .about-grid,.booking-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2.5rem}
      .about-right{padding-top:0;flex-direction:row;flex-wrap:wrap}
      .portfolio-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2.5rem}
      .photo-stack{height:360px}
      footer{flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem;text-align:center}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">By<span>Sukhraj</span></a>
  <ul>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#portfolio">Work</a></li>
    <li><a href="#book">Book</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg" style="background-image:url('data:image/webp;base64,')"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="hero-tag">Harvard &middot; Grad Portraits</p>
    <h1>Memories worth<br><em>keeping.</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Affordable thesis and graduation portraits for Harvard students: headshots, candids, and everything in between.</p>
    <a href="https://forms.gle/Zufn6kzbdHoQPGXb8" target="_blank" class="btn btn-anim">Book Your Session &rarr;</a>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section-wrap" id="about">
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-text">
      <p class="tag">About</p>
      <h2>A senior behind<br>the lens.</h2>
      <div class="rule"></div>
      <p>I'm Sukhraj, a senior at Kirkland House. Photography has been a passion of mine for years, and I shoot freelance alongside my work with the Harvard MCB department.</p>
      <p>I know the campus, the light, and the moments worth capturing. My goal is to make professional grad portraits accessible for students who don't want to break the bank for photos they'll actually keep.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="about-right">
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">48hr</div><div class="stat-label">Photo delivery turnaround</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">Student-priced</div><div class="stat-label">Flexible to fit your budget</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="portfolio" id="portfolio">
  <p class="tag">Sample Work</p>
  <h2>From the lens.</h2>
  <div class="rule"></div>
  <div class="portfolio-inner">
    <div class="photo-stack">
      <div class="p1"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Harvard grad portrait" loading="lazy"/></div>
      <div class="p2"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Harvard candid portrait" loading="lazy"/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="portfolio-cta">
      <h3>Your milestone,<br><em>beautifully shot.</em></h3>
      <p>Whether you need clean headshots or natural candids around campus, I'll make the session easy and the photos worth keeping. Shot on location around Harvard Yard.</p>
      <a href="https://forms.gle/Zufn6kzbdHoQPGXb8" target="_blank" class="btn">Get Your Photos &rarr;</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section-wrap" id="book">
  <div class="booking-grid">
    <div class="booking-left">
      <p class="tag">Booking &amp; Pricing</p>
      <h2>Let's make it<br>happen.</h2>
      <div class="rule"></div>
      <p>Pricing is flexible and tailored to what you need. Fill out the form and I'll get back to you within 24 hours with options to fit your budget. No commitment until we agree on a plan.</p>
      <a href="https://forms.gle/Zufn6kzbdHoQPGXb8" target="_blank" class="btn-outline" style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;display:inline-block">Inquire Now &rarr;</a>
      <div class="steps">
        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-num">01</div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-title">Fill the form</div>
            <p>Tell me your availability, what you're looking for, and any referral. I'll follow up within 24 hours with pricing.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-num">02</div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-title">We shoot</div>
            <p>Meet on campus. I handle the direction and you just show up.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="step">
          <div class="step-num">03</div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <div class="step-title">Get your photos</div>
            <p>Edited gallery via Google Drive within 48 hours. Download, share, print.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="booking-right">
      <div class="referral-box">
        <div class="referral-icon">&#129309;</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Referral Bonus</h3>
          <p>Referred by a fellow Harvard student? <strong>Both you and the person who referred you get 10% off</strong>. Just mention their name in the form.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:rgba(13,13,13,.5);margin-bottom:.8rem;margin-top:1.2rem;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:.68rem;">Get in touch</p>
      <div class="contact-links">
        <a href="mailto:sukhrajdulay@college.harvard.edu" class="contact-link">
          <span class="dot"></span> Email &nbsp;·&nbsp; sukhrajdulay@college.harvard.edu
        </a>
        <a href="https://instagram.com/sukhraj.dulay" target="_blank" class="contact-link">
          <span class="dot"></span> Instagram &nbsp;·&nbsp; @sukhraj.dulay
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <span>BySukhraj &middot; Cambridge, MA</span>
  <span>
    <a href="mailto:sukhrajdulay@college.harvard.edu">Email &nbsp;·&nbsp; sukhrajdulay@college.harvard.edu</a>
    &nbsp;&nbsp;&middot;&nbsp;&nbsp;
    <a href="https://instagram.com/sukhraj.dulay" target="_blank">Instagram &nbsp;·&nbsp; @sukhraj.dulay</a>
  </span>
</footer>

<script>
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.style.opacity='1'; e.target.style.transform='translateY(0)'; }
    });
  }, {threshold:0.08});
  document.querySelectorAll('.stat,.step,.referral-box,.p1,.p2,.portfolio-cta').forEach(el => {
    el.style.opacity='0';
    el.style.transform='translateY(16px)';
    el.style.transition='opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease';
    obs.observe(el);
  });
</script>
</body>
</html>
